offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, inaccurate inventory levels cause stockouts and missed sales. We provide inventory forecasting instead of manual tracking and basic spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate inventory levels leading to stockouts and overstock situations.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try sales analysis on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
